audit_items.proof_trace: All allocations in parse_definition() are wrapped in RAII smart pointers (_Obj = SharedImpl<T>): `params` (Parameters_Obj) and `body` (Block_Obj) are stack-local and freed automatically via decRefCount() when exceptions unwind the stack. The sole SASS_MEMORY_NEW call in the return statement is immediately captured by the Definition_Obj return value, transferring ownership to the caller.
